assertions.title: Initial empty state renders two labeled drop zones
assertions.reason: Initial page shows heading + File A/File B drop zones and no Continue control.

steps.observed: Heading, both file selectors, and load-result panel rendered.

steps.expected: No Continue button before any uploads
steps.observed: No continue text/control present in body text.

assertions.title: Load valid CSV File A via file picker
assertions.reason: Upload succeeded and UI updated, but API response body omitted required `file_name` field.

steps.expected: File A loads with 4 rows • 4 columns
steps.observed: Card shows file_a.csv and 4 rows • 4 columns.
200 response includes headers,row_count,columns but no file_name key.

assertions.issues: Contract mismatch: `file_name` missing from POST /api/sessions/{sid}/files/a response body.

assertions.title: Load valid CSV File B via file picker
assertions.reason: File B upload returned 200 and step advanced with File B columns loaded.

steps.action: After File A, select file_b.csv for File B
steps.expected: File B card loads and upload succeeds
steps.observed: POST /files/b returned 200 and app advanced to Configure step with B columns visible.

assertions.title: Continue control gated on both files loaded
assertions.reason: Single-file state stayed on selection step with no Continue; after both files app auto-advanced to step 2.

steps.observed: No Continue control shown in single-file state.
Flow auto-advanced directly to Configure step.

assertions.title: Load CSV via drag-and-drop
assertions.reason: Drag-over state switched to highlighted drop prompt; dropping CSV uploaded File A successfully.

steps.action: Drag CSV over File A zone
steps.observed: Class/text switched to drop-state (`Drop the local CSV file here`).

steps.action: Drop CSV on File A zone
steps.observed: POST /files/a returned 200 and File A card showed loaded metadata.

assertions.title: Reject non-CSV file by extension (picker)
assertions.reason: Non-.csv picker selection showed inline extension error and no upload request occurred.

steps.action: Select non-csv file for File A
steps.expected: Inline extension error and no upload
steps.observed: Error text rendered and fetch log remained empty.

assertions.title: Reject non-CSV file by drag-and-drop
assertions.reason: Dropping non-.csv on File B produced extension error and no POST /files/b request.

steps.action: Drop non-csv file on File B
steps.expected: Inline extension error and no upload
steps.observed: Error text rendered for File B and fetch log remained empty.

assertions.title: Replace an already loaded file
assertions.reason: File A initially loaded with file_a.csv, then replacement changed card to file_b.csv with new POST /files/a 200.

steps.action: Use Select Another File and choose file_b.csv
steps.expected: Card updates and new upload occurs
steps.observed: POST /files/a returned 200 and card updated to file_b.csv columns.

assertions.title: Same CSV accepted for both A and B
assertions.reason: Uploading file_a.csv to both slots succeeded; no blocking error and both POSTs returned 200.

steps.action: Load file_a.csv into File A then File B
steps.observed: POST /files/a and POST /files/b each returned 200 and app advanced to Configure.

assertions.title: Header-only CSV loads with zero rows
assertions.reason: Header-only CSV displayed 0 rows • 3 columns and API response returned row_count: 0 with expected headers.

steps.observed: UI showed header_only.csv with 0 rows • 3 columns.
POST /files/a returned 200 with row_count 0 and headers [id,name,amount].

frictions.description: agent-browser upload command cannot target the custom dropzone element directly because it is a div, not an input.
frictions.resolution: Used in-page event dispatch on the hidden file input / drop events to execute picker and drag-drop flows while preserving user-surface behavior.

summary: Tested 10 assertions: 9 passed, 1 failed (VAL-FILE-002 missing `file_name` in /files/a response body).
